2026/05/15 19:34:29.577186117 }

2026/05/15 19:34:34.377851391 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377860468 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377892160 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377905032 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377907016 {
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377920140 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377921022 new <- list()
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377933665 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377934437 new$width <- width
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377947672 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377948473 new$height <- height

2026/05/15 19:34:34.377963551 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377986714 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377987636 new$title <- title
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378001552 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378002915 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378017094 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378019378 new$version <- version
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378039706 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378040838 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378054564 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378055536 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378070113 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378071135 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378084049 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378084820 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378097634 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378098486 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378114867 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378115658 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378138952 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378139813 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378154671 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378155613 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378183715 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378184667 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378199735 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378200607 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378219312 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378220173 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378234821 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378235653 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378257223 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378258054 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378273904 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378274816 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378294302 "default"))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378295374 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378308639 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378309511 }
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378322335 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378323226 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378340609 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378341520 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378354375 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378355216 }
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378368932 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378369833 }
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378386655 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378387506 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378402374 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378403356 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378419386 domain = NA)
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378420288 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378429015 }
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378436960 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378447549 old$family <- family
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378448350 }
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378460533 version <- old$version
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378461445 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378477475 "2.0")
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378478427 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378491090 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378491972 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378509014 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378509835 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378527588 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378528620 domain = NA)
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378544650 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378545462 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378565179 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378566080 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378586669 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378587691 invisible()
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378625913 }

2026/05/15 19:34:34.377851391 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377860468 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377892160 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377905032 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377907016 {
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377920140 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377921022 new <- list()
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377933665 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377934437 new$width <- width
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377947672 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377948473 new$height <- height
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377962640 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377963551 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377986714 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.377987636 new$title <- title
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378001552 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378002915 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378017094 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378019378 new$version <- version
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378039706 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378040838 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378054564 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378055536 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378070113 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378071135 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378084049 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378084820 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378097634 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378098486 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378114867 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378115658 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378138952 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378139813 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378154671 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378155613 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378183715 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378184667 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378199735 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378200607 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378219312 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378220173 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378234821 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378235653 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378257223 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378258054 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378273904 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378274816 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378294302 "default"))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378295374 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378308639 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378309511 }
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378322335 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378323226 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378340609 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378341520 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378354375 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378355216 }
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378368932 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378369833 }
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378386655 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378387506 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378402374 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378403356 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378419386 domain = NA)
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378420288 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378429015 }
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378436960 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378447549 old$family <- family
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378448350 }
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378460533 version <- old$version
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378461445 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378477475 "2.0")
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378478427 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378491090 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378491972 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378509014 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378509835 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378527588 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378528620 domain = NA)
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378544650 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378545462 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378565179 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378566080 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378586669 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378587691 invisible()
2026/05/15 19:34:34.378625913 }
